name: Context-first daily intake reconciliation runtime

lineFlow.description: Load new project-local LINE messages in chronological order.
Group messages by LINE group, room, or user conversation key before judging task creation.
Load earlier and nearby messages from the same conversation so each new message is judged inside its topic thread.
Combine related messages into a topic thread using subject, participants, time continuity, replies, and explicit topic changes.
Search active total-control tasks by project, conversation, source evidence, people, dates, subject keywords, and status.
Decide whether the thread updates an existing task, creates a new event task, needs confirmation, or creates no task.
Write source evidence for every task update or new event task.

mustNotDo: create one task per sentence fragment
create tasks before searching active tasks
turn assistant commands into total-control tasks
turn pure knowledge explanations into multiple active tasks
mark sensitive financial, legal, HR, tax, medical, contractual, or external commitment items complete without owner confirmation

meetingFlow.description: Checkbox items in meeting records are confirmed meeting tasks.
Avoid duplicates by matching meeting reference plus normalized task text.
Keep or link meeting discussion, decisions, blockers, and conclusions as execution knowledge.
Apply project-local exclusion rules such as internal reading-club no-task rules unless explicit deliverables or external commitments exist.
